headline: Why Western Digital (WDC) Is Up 11.0% After Locking In AI-Driven HDD Demand Through 2026 – And What's Next
summary: In recent months, Western Digital has reported strong year-over-year revenue growth, repeated earnings beats, and reinforced its focus on high-capacity storage for AI and cloud workloads, underpinned by long-term contracts with major hyperscalers that extend through 2028. Management’s push toward over 50% gross margins, an AI-focused product roadmap including an upcoming 40TB UltraSMR HDD, and fully booked enterprise HDD capacity through 2026 highlight how AI-driven data demand is reshaping...

headline: Sandisk (SNDK) Surges 6.9% as Investors Take Advantage of Bloodbath
summary: Sandisk Corp. (NASDAQ:SNDK) is one of the 10 Must-Watch Stocks Right Now. Sandisk jumped by 6.92 percent on Friday to finish at $661.62 apiece, as investors took advantage of the broader market bloodbath to hunt for bargains in AI stocks. During the session, Sandisk Corp. (NASDAQ:SNDK) rallied alongside its counterparts in the storage sector, namely […]
